ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
Language: python
Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
Language: python
Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
Language: python
FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Flowseal/tg-ws-proxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Flowseal/tg-ws-proxy
Language: python
Local MTProto proxy server for partial bypassing of Telegram loading

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
313+ Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official
Language: python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: frappe/erpnext
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/frappe/erpnext
Language: python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local knowledge graph for Claude Code. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so Claude reads only what matters — 6.8× fewer tokens on reviews and up to 49× on daily coding tasks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/unsloth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
Language: python
Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Gemma 4, Qwen3.6, DeepSeek, gpt-oss locally.
